name: CONTRACT-BUG-2
title: validate-feature.py checks for test/run.sh but Python-only stack mandates test/run.py
description: scripts/validate-feature.py lines 57-61 check for 'test/run.sh' executable, but spec invariant 11 mandates Python is the sole scripting tech stack and test-files-exist.py line 96 checks for 'test/run.py'. validate-feature.py would FAIL on the actual contract feature itself (which has test/run.py). Direct contradiction between validator and the rest of the codebase. Expected: validate-feature.py should require test/run.py.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 1: validate-feature.py run.py path; check-naming.py rbt- prefix; module docstrings; runner invokes all tests; dead tests deleted.
